channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Every parking meter on high street broken, 28th April
item.description:
Every parking meter on high street broken So you cannot get your free 30 minute parking. I walked along the entire high street trying to find one machine that worked not one was working from mc Donald’s all the way up to the fire station. This does not encourage people to come and shop in eltham.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and rubbish on the corner of the street, 28th April
item.description:
Hi I was just emailed this issue has been resolved but I just walked past and took the photos. It has not been resolved. Thank you!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lamb Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along Dawes Street and Trafalgar Street, 28th April
item.description:
Needs a good litter pick and sweet not been done for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawes Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide, 28th April
item.description:
Hollies Avenue keeps repeatedly getting used for people in cars to inhale nitrous oxide via balloons. In the last week we have had several boxes, 15+ giant canisters, balloons and the adaptors littered all across this road. The police have been notified of the car involved - they should be charged with the cost of cleaning all these up, as I no doubt this is costing the council a fortune.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollies Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accumulating rubbish, 28th April
item.description:
Rubbish left outside on floor attracting vermin's and foxes to raid through and the rubbish is flying everywhere in the neighbourhood and my front door. It's been going on for 2 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alderwood Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous obstruction, 28th April
item.description:
Rubbish lethed by 154, dangerous to other residents

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Church Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing general waste bins that have not been collected, 28th April
item.description:
The general waste bins at Gordon lodge have not been collected in weeks. People are throwing waste in and around the bins as they are overflowing. It’s a health hazard. Please can someone collect these urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Elizabeths Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip - Pasteur Gardens, 28th April
item.description:
5 black bags in Pasteur Gardens near to junction with A10
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Clapton passage, 28th April
item.description:
Litter all along the street - probably caused by overflowing bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside charity shop gates, 28th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a load of bags and a shopping trolley blocking our back gates. We need this removed so we can still get deliveries

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping due spread as wind is forecast for next few days, 28th April
item.description:
Fly tipping is against the law. The promise of cleaning it up takes place after the wind has spread all around.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole edge is collapsing, 28th April
item.description:
Manhole edge is collapsing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned wheelie bin full of assorted rubbish, 28th April
item.description:
This has been here for several weeks and has been added to . Unsightly and a hazard on pavement. Nobody in surrounding houses seems to have claimed bin in Chestnut Grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chestnut Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 28th April
item.description:
We have a big issue with dog fouling on Templecombe Road. This is a persistent issue. People walk their dogs and rarely (if ever) pick up the poo. Please can you put up some signs and fine people who do not clean up after their dogs. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Templecombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish St Nicholas Park gardens, 28th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish st Nicholas Park strewn across pathway & park grounds

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence, 28th April
item.description:
Broken fence on council property, address 163 Ladywell road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivy Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitti, 28th April
item.description:
Please could you arrange for the graffiti to be removed from the white pillar of Asda, The Broadway, Bexleyheath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 160, Broadway, Bexley, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish over street and road people fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Crap every where
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balmoral Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A builders merchant has delivered materials for a different property, on our driveway, blocking it completely, 28th April
item.description:
I have reported it to the merchant at 8.45 and asked them to move it, but as of yet, no resolve. Spoke the neighbour who the materials are for at 213 High Street, she reported that the delivery driver told her he had no choice but to leave them where he did, even though she told him not to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second time reporting this, 28th April
item.description:
As a result litter is left on the pavement. Please empty. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thamesmere Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
